sep.gif.provenance: Neutral editorial reconstruction of a missing decorative separator.

essays/greek1.gif.text: ὁ δὲ νοῦς ἴσως θειότερόν τι καὶ ἀπαθές ἐστιν
essays/greek1.gif.provenance: Transcribed from The Sacred Wood (Project Gutenberg ebook 57795), Tradition and the Individual Talent, section III.

essays/greek2.gif.provenance: Transcribed from The Sacred Wood (Project Gutenberg ebook 57795), The Possibility of a Poetic Drama.

essays/greek3.gif.provenance: Transcribed from The Sacred Wood (Project Gutenberg ebook 57795), Euripides and Professor Murray.

essays/greek4.gif.provenance: Transcribed from The Sacred Wood (Project Gutenberg ebook 57795), Euripides and Professor Murray.

essays/greek5.gif.text:
ἐμοὶ δ’ ἄελπτον πρᾶγμα προσπεσὸν τόδε
ψυχὴν διέφθαρκ᾽· οἴχομαι δὲ καὶ βίου
χάριν μεθεῖσα κατθανεῖν χρηῄζω, φίλαι.
essays/greek5.gif.alt: Three lines in Greek from Euripides’ Medea
essays/greek5.gif.provenance: Transcribed from The Sacred Wood (Project Gutenberg ebook 57795), Euripides and Professor Murray.
